Zoomcar opens first fulfillment center in Chennai, plans 100+ centers and 1000+ cars by Dec 2024. #ExpandingFast
news.summary: Zoomcar has announced plans to expand its operations to over 100 fulfillment centers and add more than 1000 cars by December 2024. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ZCAR, is a prominent platform for self-drive car sharing. The expansion will mainly focus on strengthening their presence in Bengaluru, India.
